title: Understanding organization and context
text: The organization shall determine internal and external issues relevant to the intended outcomes of the AI management system.

title: Leadership and commitment
text: Top management shall demonstrate leadership and commitment with respect to the AI management system, including accountability for effectiveness.

title: Actions to address risks and opportunities
text: The organization shall plan actions to address AI-related risks and opportunities and integrate these actions into management system processes.

title: Competence
text: Persons performing work under the organization's control that affects AI system performance shall be competent based on education, training, or experience.

title: AI impact assessment
text: The organization shall perform and maintain AI impact assessments to identify potential harms, affected stakeholders, and mitigation controls.

title: Data and model management
text: Data quality, provenance, and model lifecycle activities shall be managed with documented controls for traceability and accountability.

title: Monitoring and measurement
text: The organization shall monitor, measure, analyze, and evaluate AI system performance and management system effectiveness at planned intervals.

title: Improvement
text: The organization shall identify opportunities for improvement and implement necessary actions to achieve intended outcomes of the AI management system.
